description_long: This is a tall, rectangular snack box with a predominantly yellow exterior and playful, retro-inspired graphics. The front features a large illustration of a silver robot pouring nuts into a bowl, with the brand name 'Coggs' and the product name 'Nutty Nuts' in bold, stylized fonts. The back of the box displays a blue robot mascot above a colorful lineup of cartoon robots, along with a promotional game offer. One side panel contains a detailed nutrition facts table, while the other side shows a diagram and instructions for a game, both bordered by additional robot illustrations. The box is made of cardboard and has flaps at the top, some of which are open, revealing the packaging's structure. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, with a mix of yellow, blue, red, and metallic tones.
description: A tall, yellow cardboard snack box with playful robot graphics, bold branding, and detailed side panels featuring nutrition facts and a game. The packaging is colorful and visually engaging, with open top flaps.
description_view_0: Side view showing the nutrition facts panel, 'Coggs Nutty Nuts' branding, and small robot illustrations at the bottom.
description_view_1: Back view featuring a blue robot mascot, a lineup of cartoon robots, and a promotional game offer with colorful graphics.
description_view_2: Side view with a diagram and instructions for a game, bordered by yellow and blue colors and additional robot graphics.
description_view_3: Front view displaying a large silver robot pouring nuts into a bowl, with prominent 'Coggs Nutty Nuts' branding and a 'Best meals' label.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Coggs' brand logo is visible on the front, side, and back panels in a stylized red font, typically located at the top of each panel.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on one side of the box, listing ingredients and nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The back panel features a blue robot mascot, a lineup of cartoon robots, and a 'Game Inside!' promotional marking with colorful graphics.
